user.title: Entities
user.description: Select the entities that Wash Reminder will monitor. Timing is configured in the next step.

data_description.trigger_entity: The WashData sensor that indicates when a cycle has finished. Use the binary sensor for the simplest setup, or a state sensor if you need to trigger on a specific state value.
data_description.trigger_state: Only for state sensors — enter the exact value that means the cycle is done (e.g. Idle). Case-sensitive. Leave empty when using a binary sensor.
data_description.person_entity_id: Notifications are held until this person arrives home.
data_description.notify_target: The mobile app notification service, e.g. notify.mobile_app_yourphone. Works with or without the notify. prefix.
data_description.door_sensor_entity_id: Optional. A contact sensor on the machine door. Opening the door automatically cancels any pending reminders.
data_description.door_sensor_inverted: Most contact sensors report "on" when the door is open. Turn this on if your sensor works the other way around — you'll know because reminders will cancel when you close the door instead of when you open it.

timing.title: Timing
timing.description: Set how often and how long reminders repeat. All of these can be changed later without reinstalling.

data_description.snooze_minutes: How long to wait after tapping Snooze before sending another reminder.
data_description.repeat_interval_minutes: How long to wait between automatic reminders when a notification is ignored.
data_description.max_repeats: Stop reminding after this many attempts. At the default 30-minute interval, 10 reminders span about 5 hours.
data_description.arrival_delay_seconds: How long to wait after arriving home before sending the notification. Gives your phone time to reconnect to WiFi. Set to 0 to notify immediately.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure
reconfigure.description: Update entity settings. The integration reloads automatically after saving.

data_description.trigger_entity: The WashData sensor that indicates when a cycle has finished.
data_description.trigger_state: Only for state sensors — enter the exact value that means the cycle is done (e.g. Idle). Leave empty when using a binary sensor.
data_description.person_entity_id: Notifications are held until this person arrives home.
data_description.notify_target: The mobile app notification service, e.g. notify.mobile_app_yourphone.
data_description.door_sensor_entity_id: Optional. A contact sensor on the machine door. Opening the door automatically cancels any pending reminders.
data_description.door_sensor_inverted: Most contact sensors report "on" when the door is open. Turn this on if your sensor works the other way around — you'll know because reminders will cancel when you close the door instead of when you open it.

error.notify_service_not_found: Notification service not found. Check that the Companion App is set up and the service name is correct (e.g. mobile_app_yourphone).
error.trigger_state_required: Enter the exact completion state for this sensor (e.g. Idle). Case-sensitive — check Developer Tools → States.

init.title: Timing
init.description: Adjust reminder timing. Changes take effect immediately.

data_description.snooze_minutes: How long to wait after tapping Snooze before sending another reminder.
data_description.repeat_interval_minutes: How long to wait between automatic reminders when a notification is ignored.
data_description.max_repeats: Stop reminding after this many attempts.
data_description.arrival_delay_seconds: How long to wait after arriving home before sending the notification. Set to 0 to notify immediately.

trigger_entity_not_found.message: Could not find {entity}. Make sure ha_washdata is installed and has finished loading before Wash Reminder starts.

person_entity_not_found.message: Could not find {entity}. Check your person configuration under Settings → People.

door_sensor_not_found.message: Could not find {entity}. Verify the entity ID under Developer Tools → States.

notify.title: 🧺 Laundry Done
notify.cycle_complete: Time to empty the washing machine.
